description: Recto: Official-looking correspondence in Arabic script. Mentions 11 dinars, something related to the government (al-[...] al-maḥrūsa),  the year 610 (=1213/14 CE) or 620 AH (= 1223/24 CE), and other quantities in pounds. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
